import torch
import torch.nn as nn

class DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.2):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)
        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0
        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)
        self.out = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)
        )
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):
        s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)
        c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)
        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb], dim=-1)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        h, _ = self.gru(x)
        h = self.dropout(h)
        logits = self.out(h)
        return logits

class DKT_TargetAttention(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.2):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)
        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0
        self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)
        
        self.target_skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)
        self.attention = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim=hidden_dim, num_heads=4, dropout=dropout, batch_first=True)
        self.query_proj = nn.Linear(embed_dim, hidden_dim)
        
        self.out = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim * 2, hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(dropout),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1)
        )
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, target_skills):
        B, T = skill_ids.shape
        
        s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)
        c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)
        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb], dim=-1)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        
        h, _ = self.gru(x)
        
        q_emb = self.target_skill_emb(target_skills)
        q = self.query_proj(q_emb)
        
        causal_mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(T, T, device=skill_ids.device) * float('-inf'), diagonal=1)
        
        attn_out, _ = self.attention(query=q, key=h, value=h, attn_mask=causal_mask)
        
        combined = torch.cat([h, attn_out], dim=-1)
        combined = self.dropout(combined)
        
        logits = self.out(combined).squeeze(-1)
        return logits
